response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience and a strong background in developer tooling, but his expertise is not heavily focused on the JVM ecosystem or enterprise IDE development. His diverse skill set and open-source contributions show adaptability, though alignment with the role's core requirements (Java/Kotlin, Spring, IDE internals) is limited.
strengths: Broad experience with developer tooling and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Proven track record in designing and optimizing complex systems (e.g., low-latency apps at Sociomantic, CI/CD pipelines at Altom).
Strong problem-solving skills and community engagement (workshops, talks, and educational initiatives).
concerns: Limited direct experience with Java/Kotlin or the Spring ecosystem, which are core to the role.
Most recent work focuses on TypeScript/Node.js and AI tooling, not JVM-based IDE development.
No explicit mention of IDE internals, language tooling, or enterprise framework integration in past roles.
